name: fastmail-mcp-server
description: MCP server for Fastmail — enables AI assistants to read, search, send, and manage emails, calendars, and contacts via the JMAP protocol

api_token.title: Fastmail API Token
api_token.description: Your Fastmail API token. Generate one at: Fastmail Settings → Privacy & Security → Manage API tokens

tools.name: list_mailboxes
tools.description: List all mailboxes (folders) in the Fastmail account

tools.name: get_identities
tools.description: Get sender identities for the account

tools.name: get_email
tools.description: Get a specific email by ID

tools.name: get_mailbox_emails
tools.description: Get emails from a specific mailbox

tools.name: get_email_attachments
tools.description: List attachments on an email without returning the full body

tools.name: move_email
tools.description: Move an email to a different mailbox

tools.name: add_labels
tools.description: Add mailbox labels to an email

tools.name: remove_labels
tools.description: Remove mailbox labels from an email

tools.name: bulk_email_action
tools.description: Perform bulk actions on multiple emails

tools.name: bulk_add_labels
tools.description: Add mailbox labels to multiple emails at once

tools.name: bulk_remove_labels
tools.description: Remove mailbox labels from multiple emails at once

tools.name: mark_mailbox_read
tools.description: Mark all emails in a mailbox as read

tools.name: get_mailbox_stats
tools.description: Get compact mailbox statistics (counts, unread, threads)

tools.name: get_account_summary
tools.description: Get account-level summary with totals, unread counts, and top mailboxes

tools.name: get_calendar_events
tools.description: Get calendar events in a date range

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search contacts by name or email

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Get a specific contact by ID

tools.name: summarize_email
tools.description: AI-powered email summarization via MCP sampling

tools.name: suggest_reply
tools.description: AI-powered reply suggestion via MCP sampling

tools.name: check_function_availability
tools.description: Check which Fastmail feature groups are available
